extortion.description: [AI generated] "Burdick Painting" is a professional painting company based in California, USA. They offer full-service professional painting services to residential, commercial, and industrial clients. Their services range from interior and exterior painting to deck staining and restoration. The team is known for its expertise, attention to detail, and dedication to providing exceptional customer service. In addition to painting, they offer drywall repair and installation, wallpaper removal, and power washing.
